text: Death toll from flash flood confirmed at 500 in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Families may claim remains at the morgue.
DepEd Batangas cancels classes due to PAGASA heat advisory. Extreme heat poses health risk to students.
Ang relief goods mula sa LGU ay ibinibigay na sa mga affected families sa Barangay Marikina Heights. Isa lang per pamilya.
River rescue at Brgy. Fatima General Santos: swift water rescue team recovering family stranded on mid-river debris.
Heat-related rescue in Brgy. Pandacan Manila: elderly woman in distress found on street during extreme heat advisory.
Casualty report update: 15 dead, 22 missing, 180 displaced in Barangay Marikina Heights as of 8pm today.
Preemptive evacuation order issued for danger zones in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. LGU providing transport assistance.
RESCUE: Elderly resident found unconscious due to heat stroke at Brgy. Daraga Albay. Ambulance dispatched.
Post-mortem results for heat stroke victim from Barangay Marikina Heights: cause of death heat hyperthermia. Third case this week.
Warning: Do not return to Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley without clearance from DRRMO. Flood waters still being assessed.
Ang bilang ng patay mula sa baha sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley ay tumaas na sa 9. Naghahanap pa ng 6 na nawawala.
Road to Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental IMPASSABLE due to landslide. DPWH equipment deployed. Alternate route via highway 12.
Displacement update: 50 families na ang naka-shelter sa covered court ng Sitio Riverside Marikina. Overflow na ang dami.
Volcanic ash from Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro volcano detected. Air quality hazardous. Wear masks and close windows.
Hindi pa pwedeng umuwi ang mga taga-Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Aktibo pa ang bulkan. Manatili sa evacuation center.
Ang DSWD MDM team ay aktibo sa Brgy. Carmen CDO para sa family tracing at death certificate processing.
All communication lines to Brgy. Daraga Albay restored after 36-hour outage from volcanic eruption damage.
Swift water rescue team training deployed to actual operations at Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga river during lahar event.
Family tracing for Barangay Paco Manila volcanic eruption: 15 persons still unaccounted for. Report to DSWD MDM desk.
Red Cross medical team at Brgy. Daraga Albay bringing medicine, IV fluids, and first aid kits for flood survivors.
Road to Brgy. Pandacan Manila volcano observation post closed due to volcanic hazard. Only PHIVOLCS personnel allowed.
Bridge at Brgy. Poblacion Iligan washed out by flash flood. Heavy vehicles diverted via pontoon bridge.
DOH mobile clinic stationed at Sitio Masag Albay. Treating fever, wound care, diarrhea, and leptospirosis cases.
Evacuation route from Brgy. Talisay Batangas volcanic danger zone reopened after DPWH cleared debris from main road.
Mga kababayan, ang evacuation center sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental brgy hall ay puno na. Pumunta sa secondary site sa sports complex.
Nablock ang kalsada sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Landslide po. DPWH padating na. Iwasan muna ang lugar.
Ang aking kaibigan ay nawawala mula nang bumaha sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Nahanap na ba siya ng sinuman?
Classes resume next Monday for Sitio Mabolo Albay schools. Buildings assessed as safe. See you mga estudyante!
Libreng handa sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos community kitchen. Priority sa mga bata at matatanda ngayong mainit ang panahon.
Signal No. 2 pa rin sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. LGU nagtatayo ng karagdagang evacuation center para sa mga hindi pa lumikas.
Nutrition assistance para sa malnourished children sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas health center. Magdala ng health card.
Meralco linemen nagtatrabaho sa tag-araw na init para maibalik ang kuryente sa Brgy. Carmen CDO. Salamat!
Ang tulay sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos ay nasira ng baha at lahar. Kailangan ng ilang linggo bago maayos.
Decampment process simula na sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation center. LGU tumutulong sa mga pamilyang umuuwi na.
Food packs with high-energy biscuits and canned goods being distributed in Barangay Anibong Tacloban volcanic evacuation area.
Rescue operation in Sitio Mabolo Albay: 30 persons rescued this afternoon. Operations continuing for remaining stranded.
Body found along the Barangay Balulang CDO riverbank identified as flood victim. Family notified. Burial arrangements ongoing.
SOS! TRAPPED SA BUBONG! Floodwater waist-deep at rising fast! Need rescue boat AGAD sa Barangay Paco Manila!
Logistics team coordinating boat transport for communities cut off by flooding in Sitio Masag Albay.
Water refill stations activated at Brgy. Daraga Albay. Residents may bring containers up to 20 liters per household.
Missing fishermen from Barangay Paco Manila declared dead after 30-day search. Bodies never recovered. Certificates issued.
Lahar rescue operations ongoing in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley river channel. Army and BFP boats deployed for stranded residents.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Ang mga residente mula sa 4km danger zone ng Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga volcano ay tumatanggap na ng relief goods.
Libre baby formula at diapers para sa mga buntis at sanggol sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley distribution point.
All stranded residents in Brgy. Tumana Marikina volcanic zone have been safely evacuated. Rescue operations complete.
Air quality advisory para sa mga may sakit sa puso: Huwag lumabas habang ang air quality index ay nasa 201-300 range sa Maynila ngayon.
NFI distribution: hygiene kits and sleeping mats for 150 displaced families from Sitio Riverside Marikina volcanic zone.
Mga estudyante sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay nakatanggap ng printed modules habang sarado ang kanilang paaralan.
Ang mga nakatira sa loob ng 6km permanent danger zone ng Barangay Agusan CDO bulkan ay KAILANGANG LUMIKAS NA.
MAYDAY! Naiipit kami sa loob ng bahay sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina! Tubig hanggang bintana na! Tulong po!
DepEd nag-announce na ng no classes. Mag-stay sa bahay mga bata. Hindi ligtas lumabas ngayon sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina.
No classes in Sitio Mabolo Albay tomorrow due to extreme heat index. DepEd prioritizes student health and safety.
Ang pamilya ng mga biktima ng lahar sa Sitio Masag Albay ay maaaring pumunta sa MDM desk para sa tulong.
Barangay Brgy. Tumana Marikina begins door-to-door evacuation along sitio riverside. Officials and BFP assisting families.
SOS! Naiipit ang aming pamilya sa lahar sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga! Hindi na kami makalabas sa bahay! Tulong!
Typhoon Signal No. 4 raised over Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Mandatory pre-emptive evacuation of coastal and low-lying areas.
SOS mula sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan: nastranded na hikers, 5 tao, 2 sugatan. Mountain trail blocked ng landslide.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: LGU Cavite distributes 300 food packs and 50 hygiene kits to flood-affected families today.
ADVISORY: MAGSUOT NG FACEMASK. Naitala ang VERY UNHEALTHY sa Air Quality Sensors ng Lungsod ng Maynila. Iwasan ang paglabas kung hindi kinakailangan.
Nalumikas na kami sa evacuation center sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Safe naman kami dito. Salamat sa LGU Batangas.
Wala na pong signal sa buong Barangay Balulang CDO. Globe, Smart, TM lahat wala. Gumagamit na kami ng radio.
No classes na naman bukas! Sobrang init at mataas ang heat index sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos. DepEd suspends ulit.
DSWD mobile relief team deployed to Barangay Paco Manila communities affected by ashfall from volcanic eruption.
Search for missing fishermen ongoing. 4 boats from Barangay Marikina Heights still unaccounted for after the storm.
Rescue boat deployed to Brgy. Daraga Albay. Prioritizing elderly, children, and PWDs stranded in floodwater.
Natuklasan ang katawan ng isa sa mga nawawalang residente sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. Ipinagdadasal namin siya.
Class suspension confirmed! Walang klase bukas sa lahat ng levels sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina. Abangan ang advisory.
Typhoon update: Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley covered court evacuation center now accommodating 500 displaced families.
Road update sa Barangay Balulang CDO: passable na sa isang lane. Slow traffic pa rin. DPWH nag-aayos pa.
Health teams deployed to Barangay Marikina Heights to monitor for waterborne diseases including diarrhea and cholera.
Navy rescue personnel assisting in evacuation of stranded residents in Brgy. Fatima General Santos floodwater.
Cell site sa bundok ng Barangay Agusan CDO natanggal ng bagyo. Satellite phone lang ang gumagana sa lugar.
Nablock na lahat ng daan sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte dahil sa lahar. Mga relief trucks nagde-detour na sa kabila.
Ang mga displaced families sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley ay puwedeng manatili sa evacuation center hanggang ligtas na.
SOS mula sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro: isang lolo at dalawang bata ay naiipit sa lahar! Kailangan ng rescue agad!
Confirmed dead in the landslide at Barangay Paco Manila: 2 adults, 1 child. Search for more survivors ongoing.
SARADO ang tulay sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte dahil sa baha! Gumamit ng alternatibong daan papunta sa Bulacan.
DepEd Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental says schools will reopen once ashfall is cleaned and ventilation systems are cleared.
MISSING child: Anak ko nawawala! 8 years old, nahulog sa baha malapit sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Tulong po!
ALERTO: Ang usok mula sa sunog sa landfill ay nakakaapekto sa kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila at karatig-siyudad. Magsuot ng N95 mask.
DRRM advisory: Monitored air quality sensors sa apat na lokasyon sa Maynila ay nagpapakita ng mapanganib na antas ng polusyon ngayong araw.
Relief goods konti na lang sa Sitio Mabolo Albay! Maraming families pa ang wala. Requesting additional supplies mula DSWD.
Fire out at Brgy. Daraga Albay! BFP controlled the fire. No casualties reported. BFP reminds public to report fires immediately.
FIRE! Sumalab ang bahay sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos. BFP patungo na. Lumayo na mga tao sa paligid!
Air quality warning: Huwag mag-exercise sa labas ng bahay ngayon sa Maynila. Ang masamang hangin ay mapanganib sa puso at baga.
Hangin mula sa burning landfill ay nagtutulak ng usok sa direksyon ng Maynila. AQI forecast: VERY UNHEALTHY hanggang gabi. Manatiling alerto.
Cell on Wheels (COW) unit deployed to Sitio Mabolo Albay evacuation center. Signal now available for residents.
Relief convoy galing Marikina dumating na sa Barangay Agusan CDO. 200 boxes ng relief goods at hygiene kits.
DepEd Brgy. Poblacion Iligan advisory: No classes for elementary, high school, and college levels until further notice.
Alternate road to Brgy. Fatima General Santos via provincial bypass now operational. DPWH opens route for relief convoys.
Puno na ang unang evacuation center sa Brgy. Daraga Albay. Pumunta na sa Sports Hub bilang secondary shelter.
Mababa ang kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila simula ngayong gabi. Mga may asthma at respiratory conditions: huwag lumabas. Gamitin ang inhaler.
Blackout na nang 2 araw sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. Generator na lang ang naiiwanan namin. Sana mabilis na.
Medical mission at Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga evacuation center. Free consultation and medicines available 8am to 5pm today.
Heat stroke emergency: 3 patients from Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga admitted to hospital. Walang pasok para sa mga outdoor workers.
Typhoon-induced flooding in Barangay Agusan CDO forces 500 additional families into evacuation. Centers now at capacity.
Rescue helicopter from Brgy. Fatima General Santos airlifts 12 persons stranded by volcanic lahar in riverside community.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Safe naman kami sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan evacuation site. Maraming salamat sa lahat ng nagbigay ng pagkain at tulong.
School principals in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga coordinating with barangay to ensure no students commuting in dangerous ashfall.
Class suspension advisory: No classes in all levels in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga due to heat index reaching 45°C.
Patay na ang isang lalaki na nahanap sa Barangay Marikina Heights riverbank. Dinala na sa morgue ng probinsya.
Bridge at Barangay Agusan CDO flooded with lahar debris. Engineers inspecting structural integrity before reopening.
Family tracing desk bukas sa Sitio Mabolo Albay evacuation center. I-report ang mga nawawalang pamilya ngayon.
URGENT: Wala na pong food pack dito sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga! Need pa ng bigas at canned goods para sa 100 families!
5 fishermen missing after boat capsized near Brgy. Tumana Marikina coast. PCG search and rescue ongoing.
No network sa amin sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga! May makaka-abot ba sa Davao? May signal pa ba diyan?
DepEd releases distance learning materials for Brgy. Fatima General Santos students affected by volcanic eruption school closure.
HEAT INDEX ADVISORY: Apparent temperature in Brgy. Daraga Albay reaches 45°C. DANGER level. Avoid outdoor activities 10am-4pm.
Donation drive for Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental evacuees: accepting canned goods, rice, bottled water, and hygiene items.
Ang aming pamilya ay naka-shelter na sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga covered court. May relief goods at tubig. Salamat DSWD.
MISSING: Juan dela Cruz, 55 years old, last seen at Brgy. Pandacan Manila before the typhoon. Wearing blue jacket.
USAR team deployed to Brgy. San Roque Marikina after lahar buried 3 houses. Rescue dogs and thermal cameras in use.
DepEd nagbibigay ng make-up classes pagkatapos ng baha. School calendar extended ng 2 linggo sa Sitio Mabolo Albay.
Evacuation order lifted for parts of Sitio Mabolo Albay. Residents may return home after clearance from DRRMO.
Power restoration underway in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. 70 percent of households back online as of 6pm.
Return to school date for Sitio Masag Albay announced: Monday next week, pending clearance from PHIVOLCS.
Confirmed dead na ang 3 residente ng Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Nagsisimula na ng proseso para sa burial at interment.
Mga donation ng tubig at pagkain para sa mga evacuees mula Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley volcano ay tinatanggap sa barangay hall.
Ang sunog ay naapula na ng BFP sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Dalawang pamilya ang naapektuhan. Ligtas na lahat.
Overcrowding reported at Brgy. Pandacan Manila evacuation site. DSWD opening additional facility at municipal plaza.
DOH-Tacloban nagpapadala ng health team para subaybayan ang mga heat stroke at dehydration cases sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan.
Ashfall causes power outage in Sitio Masag Albay. Meralco isolating affected lines. Restoration estimate: 12 hours.
Heat stroke emergency: 5 outdoor workers collapsed in Sitio Riverside Marikina needing immediate medical rescue.
No power in Sitio Masag Albay for 48 hours. Generator sets operating at hospitals and evacuation centers.
May nastranded na hikers sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro bundok dahil sa landslide. Search party naalis na.
No classes na ngayon sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental hanggang sa karagdagang paunawa ng DepEd. Manatili sa bahay.
Red Cross distributing relief goods to volcano-affected families in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Operations 7am to 5pm.
Nakatanggap na kami ng libreng pagkain at tubig mula sa LGU Leyte. Maraming salamat sa aming barangay!
Rescue needed: 5 persons stranded on rooftop in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Water chest-deep and still rising.
DRRMO Tacloban coordinating with PHIVOLCS for updated danger zone maps for Brgy. Tumana Marikina volcano evacuation.
Power interruption sa Barangay Paco Manila: Meralco nagtatayo ng temporary lines para sa evacuation centers muna.
Rescue operations in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City: BFP, PNP, and Army coordinating extraction of 40 stranded residents.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: WASH advisory: Boil all drinking water in Brgy. Talisay Batangas following ashfall contamination of water sources.
Mag-ingat sa kalsada papunta sa Brgy. Carmen CDO. Maraming potholes at floating debris pagkatapos ng baha.
Medical team ng DOH nandito na sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Libre ang konsultasyon at gamot para sa lahat ng evacuees.
Post-disaster mortality review for Brgy. Carmen CDO: 22 total deaths, 8 from drowning, 6 from trauma, 8 disease-related.
No face-to-face classes in Barangay Agusan CDO due to Typhoon Signal No. 2. Online and modular learning activated.
PHIVOLCS advisory: Lava flows possible at Sitio Mabolo Albay within 24 hours. Do not return to danger zone.
No signal and no power in Brgy. Fatima General Santos volcano evacuation zone. Emergency radio only communication channel.
Evacuation center ni-register lahat ng displaced families sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. Magdala ng ID at gamit para isang linggo.
Family welfare desks naka-set up sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation site. I-report dito ang mga nawawalang miyembro ng pamilya.
Volcanic eruption imminent at Sitio Mabolo Albay. PHIVOLCS orders total evacuation of all communities near the volcano.
Ang mga guro ay nagbibigay ng mga module sa mga estudyanteng hindi makarating sa paaralan sa Sitio Mabolo Albay.
DPWH nag-aayos na ng daan sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Tatlong araw pa bago ganap na maabot ang sitio.
May leptospirosis na sa aming lugar sa Sitio Masag Albay. Iwasan ang pagtapak sa maruming tubig-baha. Mag-ingat!
Community kitchen at Barangay Paco Manila is now serving hot meals. Queue management in effect. Priority for elderly and children.
Supply truck natigil sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila junction. Baha masyadong malalim. Naghihintay na bumaba ang tubig.
Heat exhaustion cases reported at Brgy. Fatima General Santos outdoor market. DOH team dispatched. Symptoms: dizziness, weakness.
Casualty update for Brgy. San Roque Marikina: 150 dead confirmed, bodies recovered and brought to provincial morgue.
Medical tents with cooling stations deployed at Brgy. Tumana Marikina evacuation center for heat-stressed evacuees.
Family tracing desk at Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental evacuation center: 47 persons reunited with families so far this week.
Cool centers open at Brgy. Tumana Marikina covered court and gymnasium. Free air conditioning for senior citizens and children.
DOH nagbababala: Dehydration at heat stroke ang pangunahing panganib sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City ngayong araw. Uminom ng maraming tubig.
Walang kuryente dito sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina simula kahapon! Meralco saan na kayo? Kailan maibabalik ang power?
Hotline ng Manila City DRRM Department para sa emergency: (02) 8463-3295 / 0950-700-3710. Tumawag kung may health emergency dahil sa polusyon.
Meralco restoring power in Barangay Paco Manila. Estimated restoration: 18 to 24 hours. Repair crews deployed.
150 displaced families now sheltered at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City gymnasium. Additional centers being opened tonight.
DepEd advisory sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan: lahat ng paaralan ay sarado bukas dahil sa Typhoon Signal No. 3.
Air quality update sa Maynila: VERY UNHEALTHY level. Possibleng dahilan ang usok mula sa Navotas Landfill. Manatiling alerto.
Puno na ang evacuation center sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Pumunta sa bagong shelter sa sports complex ng bayan.
Pediatric advisory: Huwag palabasin ang mga bata sa labas ng bahay sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental dahil sa matinding init.
Air quality VERY UNHEALTHY sa Puregold Tayuman area at karatig-lugar. Mahigpit na inirerekomenda na huwag lumabas nang walang facemask.
Rescue boat needed at Brgy. Pandacan Manila lahar danger zone! Nanay at tatlong bata stranded. Rescue team padating.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Displaced families from Brgy. Fatima General Santos to be temporarily relocated to safer housing pending flood damage assessment.
Usok mula sa Navotas Landfill fire ay patuloy na nakakaapekto sa air quality ng Maynila, Malabon, Navotas, at Caloocan. Mag-ingat.
Ang mga relief goods ay naghihintay sa barangay hall ng Sitio Masag Albay. Pumunta na at magdala ng ID.
Red Cross distributing 100 family food packs in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro today. Donations of canned goods and rice still accepted.
BFP and NDRRMC rescue team extracting 100 families from lahar-inundated areas of Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga.
Huwag uminom ng tubig mula sa gripo sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Contaminated na dahil sa baha. Bumili ng mineral water.
PHIVOLCS confirms lava fountaining at Barangay Paco Manila crater. Lahars possible in river channels. Evacuate river zones.
Ang Manila DRRM ay nagmo-monitor ng air quality sa 4 na sensor locations. Kasalukuyang lahat ay nasa VERY UNHEALTHY hanggang HAZARDOUS na antas.
School supplies at libro nasira ng baha sa Barangay Balulang CDO. DepEd nagre-request ng donations para sa mga estudyante.
Oral rehydration salts at energy drinks ibinibigay ng health center sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental para sa heat-related cases.
3 school buildings damaged by flooding in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. DepEd repair timeline: 2 to 3 weeks.
Ashfall-induced brownout in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte: short circuit from ash accumulation on transformer. Clearing ongoing.
Nakatanggap na kami ng food pack at tubig mula DSWD sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina. May kasamang canned goods at blanket.
Ang mga bata sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay binibigyan ng bitamina at gamot. Dalhin ang inyong anak sa health tent.
Ang DSWD ay nagbibigay ng mga batayang pangangailangan sa mga pamilyang apektado ng baha sa Sitio Masag Albay.
Brownout schedule sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila ngayong araw dahil sa overloading ng grid dahil sa mainit na panahon.
Convoy ng 10 trucks dumating na sa Sitio Masag Albay pagkatapos ng 12-oras na byahe via alternate mountain road.
Teachers at Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga school-turned-evacuation-center voluntarily assist displaced families after class suspension.
LUMIKAS NA KAYO! Mataas na ang tubig dito sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Bukas na ang evacuation center sa elementarya.
ALERT: Ashfall advisory for Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Keep children indoors. Ashfall causes respiratory irritation and eye problems.
Death toll from volcanic eruption in Brgy. Pandacan Manila rises to 7. Recovery teams still searching for missing.
URGENT: Patient na may symptoms ng leptospirosis sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan covered court. Need first aid team agad!
DPWH road clearing underway in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental after ashfall. Roads expected to be fully passable by tomorrow morning.
Walang kuryente sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina dahil sa abo ng bulkan. Meralco nag-iinspeksyon ng mga linya.
Hindi pa pwedeng umuwi ang mga evacuees sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Naghihintay pa ng clearance mula sa barangay.
Relief packs including bottled water and energy bars distributed to 150 families in Barangay Marikina Heights amid heat advisory.
Missing person alert: Maria Dela Cruz, 45, last seen fleeing lahar in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Wearing red blouse.
Walang klase bukas! Masaya ang mga bata sa Barangay Agusan CDO pero nakakatakot ang baha sa labas.
Hindi maaaring pumasok ang mga bata sa paaralan sa Barangay Balulang CDO. Sarado pa ang mga daan.
Walang klase bukas dahil sa init! Heat index DANGER level sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Stay hydrated mga bata!
Ante-mortem data collection ongoing for Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City flood victims. Bring recent photos and descriptions.
EMERGENCY: Isang bata ang nalunod sa baha sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Dinala na sa ospital. Mangyaring mag-ingat sa paligid.
Volunteer rescue swimmers responding to Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan lahar zone. Requesting additional boats from LGU.
WALANG PASOK bukas sa Sitio Mabolo Albay at karatig-bayan dahil sa matinding init. Heat index DANGER level na.
Air quality sensor sa Sampaloc at Tondo ay nagpapakita ng VERY UNHEALTHY. Iwasan ang lugar na may mataas na polusyon ngayon.
No internet available sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga upland barangays. PLDT deploying additional equipment.
Naputol ang tulay papunta sa Barangay Balulang CDO. Pag-aralan ang ibang daan bago umalis.
Death toll from flash flood in Brgy. Carmen CDO confirmed at 6. NDRRMC concludes search after 7 days.
Ang mga evacuees mula sa Sitio Masag Albay volcanic zone ay maaaring mag-register sa DSWD para sa assistance.
Ang health center sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina ay bukas hanggang 8pm. Libre ang pagtingin sa mga may sakit na apektado.
Air quality advisory: VERY UNHEALTHY level detected in Manila and nearby cities. Ang mga bata, senior citizens, buntis, at may hika ay dapat manatili sa loob.
Ang kalsada papunta sa Brgy. Daraga Albay ay natatakpan ng makapal na abo. DPWH nag-aayos. Huwag muna pumunta.
Ferry service suspended in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley due to rough seas from typhoon. Supply barges on standby.
Nandito na kami sa evacuation center sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Ikatlong gabi na namin dito. Sana makauwi na kami.
Typhoon downed 12 power poles in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Meralco crew working overnight restoration. ETA 24 hours.
Ang sunog sa Navotas Landfill ay nagdudulot ng masamang kalidad ng hangin sa buong Maynila. Sarado ang ilang outdoor venues bilang pag-iingat.
Mga residente ng Maynila: Isara ang mga bintana at pinto. Ang outdoor air quality ay VERY UNHEALTHY dahil sa usok at particulate matter.
NDRRMC casualty update: 100 dead, 12 missing from typhoon in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Recovery operations ongoing.
Food packs containing 5kg rice, sardines, and canned goods available at Barangay Marikina Heights distribution center. One pack per family.
Road visibility near zero in Brgy. San Roque Marikina due to heavy ashfall. Motorists advised to pull over and wait.
Ang alternate route via sitio Brgy. San Roque Marikina ay passable na para sa medium trucks. 4WD recommended.
Post-mortem examination ordered for body found in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Identity still being confirmed by authorities.
NTC advisory: Emergency radio frequencies active. Tune to DZRH or local FM for disaster updates.
School feeding program suspended during displacement in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Nutrition packs distributed to families.
Facemask reminder: Ang air quality sa Lungsod ng Maynila ay VERY UNHEALTHY na. Protektahan ang inyong kalusugan. Iwasan ang outdoor activities.
Identification of volcanic eruption victims in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga ongoing. NDRRMC using ante-mortem data records.
Ang mga naiipit ay inililigtas na sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Huwag matakot. Ang rescue team ay patungo na.
Emergency water distribution for drought-hit families in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. 20L per household, bring container.
Communication restored in Sitio Masag Albay using emergency satellite link. Contact numbers for LGU updated.
School buildings in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan being used as evacuation centers. All classes moved to online learning mode.
Helicopter rescue ongoing for communities in Brgy. Pandacan Manila cut off by landslide. 50 persons airlifted.
BFP please tumugon sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina! May sunog at hindi kami makalabas! Naiipit sa loob!
Cool center at Sitio Riverside Marikina gymnasium open 6am to 10pm. Libreng tubig, electric fan, at first aid on standby.
Air quality advisory: Barangay Paco Manila classified VERY UNHEALTHY due to volcanic ashfall. Wear N95 mask outdoors.
Ang DSWD ay naghahanda ng food packs para sa mga pamilyang lumikas dahil sa bulkang aktibidad sa Barangay Paco Manila.
Clean water supply restored to Barangays 4 to 7 in Barangay Paco Manila. Boil for 5 minutes before drinking as precaution.
Lahar flow blocking the main highway near Brgy. Carmen CDO. DPWH monitoring. Alternate route via mountain road.
Death certificates being processed at Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan municipal hall. Bring burial clearance documents.
Management of the Dead and Missing team deployed to Barangay Balulang CDO by NDRRMC. Operations 24 hours.
Road update: Brgy. San Roque Marikina national road now passable for light vehicles after DPWH ashfall clearing operations.
Official death toll update for typhoon in Barangay Paco Manila: 18 confirmed dead, 7 missing, 250 injured.
Ayuda para sa mga walang hanapbuhay dahil sa volcanic unrest sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas. I-register sa DSWD ngayon.
URGENT: Kulang na ang bottled water sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga relief center! Requesting immediate resupply from LGU!
TXTFIRE! Sunog sa Sitio Masag Albay! Tumawag sa BFP ngayon! Lumayas na sa lugar!
Water purification tablets distributed to 200 households in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Do not drink untreated floodwater.
Heat-related death confirmed in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. DOH investigating heat stroke fatality. Public warned.
Blackout pa rin sa Brgy. Daraga Albay. Running low na sa power bank. Sana maibalik na ang kuryente.
Road safety alert: Sitio Kapatagan Leyte national highway has 15cm ashfall layer. Motorcycles banned from this route.
Libre na gamot para sa mga may sakit sa Sitio Mabolo Albay evacuation center. Pumunta sa health tent.
No face-to-face classes hanggang sa karagdagang abiso. Distance learning mode activated para sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina.
Food donation drive ongoing for Brgy. Carmen CDO. Target: 500 food packs for displaced families. Help us reach the goal.
DOH issues leptospirosis alert for flood-affected barangays in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Avoid wading in floodwater. Wear protective boots.
Power restored to 60% of Brgy. Tumana Marikina after typhoon damage repairs. Remaining areas by end of day.
PLDT fiber cut in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley due to ashfall weight on cables. Internet service disrupted for area.
Volcano alert in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte: Barangay captains conducting door-to-door checks to ensure all residents evacuated.
Typhoon-displaced students from Barangay Balulang CDO given alternate learning activities while evacuation centers active.
Ipinagpapaliban ang lahat ng school activities sa Sitio Mabolo Albay hanggang sa karagdagang paunawa ng DepEd.
Walang kuryente sa Barangay Agusan CDO mula kahapon. Mag-ingat sa kandila. Sana mabilis pong maibalik.
MANDATORY EVACUATION: Alert Level 4 declared for Barangay Balulang CDO volcano. All residents must leave immediately.
Death toll from heat stroke in Barangay Paco Manila province rises to 4. DOH urges extreme caution during heat wave.
Emergency satellite communication deployed in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan for disaster coordination after cell tower damage.
Supply delivery to isolated barangays in Brgy. Pandacan Manila by boat due to all land routes blocked by typhoon debris.
Extreme heat alert for Barangay Marikina Heights. Heat index forecast at 43°C to 46°C. At-risk: elderly, children, outdoor workers.
Health alert sa Maynila: Ang mga nagtatrabaho sa labas ng bahay ay dapat magbihis ng makapal at magsuot ng N95 mask laban sa polusyon.
Rescue boat needed URGENTLY at Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley! Elderly couple stranded on roof. Please respond now!
DOH nagpaalala sa mga evacuees sa Brgy. Daraga Albay na inumin ang maintenance medicine. Available ang refills sa clinic.
Ang mga cargo trucks ay hindi makaraan sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina dahil sa nabagsak na tulay.
Buntis na mga nanay sa Maynila: Ang pagkakalantad sa masamang hangin ay mapanganib sa inyong sanggol. Manatili sa loob ng bahay ngayon.
DepEd releases learning continuity plan for flood-affected areas in Sitio Riverside Marikina. Printed modules distributed.
Volcanic eruption damaged power infrastructure near Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Blackout expected for 2 to 3 days.
Tulong po para sa mga pamilyang walang makain sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Makikipag-ugnayan sa DSWD para sa relief goods.
Heat wave causing power demand surge in Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Meralco warns of possible brownout 1pm to 6pm.
Walang kuryente at signal sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan nang 3 araw na. Sana mabilis maibalik ng Meralco at Globe.
Typhoon aftermath: fallen trees block 12 roads in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga municipality. Clearing operations underway.
Heat advisory from PAGASA: Barangay Balulang CDO and nearby municipalities to experience 'feels like' temperature of 48°C tomorrow.
ADVISORY: Fine particulate matter (PM2.5) sa mapanganib na antas sa buong Maynila. Magsuot ng facemask lalo na ang mahihina ang kalusugan.
Ang MDM team ng NDRRMC ay aktibo sa Brgy. Carmen CDO. Mag-report ng mga nawawalang kamag-anak dito.
All clear at Sitio Masag Albay: all trapped residents rescued safely. Rescue teams thank community for cooperation.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Coast Guard conducting swift water rescue in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan river. 12 families rescued so far. Operations ongoing.
Camp coordination team at Barangay Agusan CDO: headcount ongoing. 150 registered evacuees as of 6pm.
NTC advisory: Temporary frequency spectrum allocation for disaster communications in Sitio Mabolo Albay area.
Transformer napalitan sa main substation ng Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Naka-grid na ulit. Thank you Meralco.
Schools in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro to remain closed for 1 week due to ashfall damage and air quality concerns.
Naligtas na ang mga bata sa baha sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Salamat sa BFP at sa lahat ng nagtulungan.
Naligtas na ang pamilya mula sa lahar sa Sitio Mabolo Albay. Salamat sa Coast Guard at Army rescue teams.
2 persons confirmed dead after lahar swept through Brgy. San Roque Marikina community. 4 still missing.
Body identified as missing resident from Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Next of kin contacted. Interment on Saturday.
May klase ba bukas? Hindi pa malinaw ang DepEd advisory sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Abangan ang opisyal na anunsyo.
WALANG PASOK bukas sa lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City! DepEd order na. Stay safe mga estudyante.
Volcanic gases detected near Brgy. Pandacan Manila communities. Sulfur dioxide levels elevated. Residents advised to wear masks.
Death toll rises to 8 as recovery operations continue in Sitio Mabolo Albay. Search for 5 missing persons ongoing.
Temporary cell tower installed at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City evacuation area. Signal strength 3G. Voice calls operational.
Walang pasok! Super init ngayon sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Hindi ligtas ang mga bata. DepEd nag-suspend na.
WALANG PASOK: Ashfall from Brgy. Carmen CDO volcano makes road travel dangerous for students. Await DepEd advisory.
Nag-distribute na ng relief goods sa brgy hall ng Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Magdala ng ID para makakuha ng food pack.
Chokepoint sa national highway ng Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley dahil sa demolition ng damaged bridge. Abangan ang updates.
Relief goods delivery to Barangay Anibong Tacloban delayed due to 3 blocked roads. Air delivery being explored by NDRRMC.
75 families allowed to return home after flood receded in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. 300 families still remaining in shelter.
Missing person alert: Maria Santos, 62, Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental resident. Last seen evacuating Sitio Riverside yesterday.
Naiipit pa rin ang 50 pamilya sa Brgy. Carmen CDO. Hindi pa nakakarating ang rescue boat. Tulong po!
Schools used as evacuation centers in Barangay Paco Manila during typhoon. Classes suspended until displaced families leave.
PCG conducting search for missing boat with 50 passengers near Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City during typhoon.
MANDATORY EVACUATION: All residents in low-lying areas near Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley river must evacuate immediately.
May libreng canned goods at bigas sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Pumunta na kung kailangan ng inyong pamilya.
DPWH nagtatrabaho nang walang tigil para linisin ang kalsada ng Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan mula sa lahar at abo ng bulkan.
Online class na lang bukas para sa lahat ng students sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Tingnan ang Google Classroom.
Ambulance requested para sa 3 critical patients sa Barangay Paco Manila evacuation center! Kailangan ng transport ngayon!
DPWH ash-clearing trucks deployed overnight in Barangay Marikina Heights. Expect limited visibility and road narrowing.
Diarrhea cases dumami sa Barangay Balulang CDO evacuation center. DOH nagpadala ng karagdagang health personnel.
Heatwave relief: cold water, ORS, and snacks available at Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga community center. Libre para sa lahat.
OFFICIAL: DepEd suspends classes in all grade levels in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental effective tomorrow. Monitor official advisory.
Dengue alert kasabay ng flood advisory sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Gamitin ang mosquito net at alisin ang nakaimbak na tubig.
Water refill stations now at 5 strategic points in Sitio Riverside Marikina. Free for all residents during heat emergency.
Hydration stations set up along evacuation routes from Brgy. Talisay Batangas due to high heat index. Water and ORS available.
DRRM update: Air quality sa Maynila ay bahagyang bumababa mula HAZARDOUS papunta VERY UNHEALTHY. Patuloy na mag-ingat at magsuot ng mask.
MnlCDRRMD heat advisory: Heat index sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas ay nasa DANGER level na. Umiwas sa panlabas na gawain.
Nagpapadala ng karagdagang cots at kumot sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban evacuation centers para sa mga bagong dating na evacuees.
DepEd issues class suspension for Sitio Kapatagan Leyte and surrounding towns due to volcanic ash affecting air quality.
3 bodies recovered from debris in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Death toll officially revised upward. Autopsies ordered.
Remains of 2 victims of Barangay Paco Manila volcanic lahar identified at provincial morgue. Burial rites ongoing.
DOST-EMB air quality index sa Sitio Riverside Marikina ay 201-300 VERY UNHEALTHY. Mag-stay sa loob ng bahay.
Panahon ng tag-araw: nagbibigay ang DSWD ng rehydration packs at snacks sa mga batang apektado sa Barangay Balulang CDO.
100 families evacuated from Sitio Mabolo Albay volcanic danger zone. Temporary shelter at General Santos Sports Complex.
NTC coordinating with telcos for priority restoration of Sitio Mabolo Albay DRRMO communication lines.
Manila City DRRM nagbibigay ng libreng facemasks sa mga barangay hall. Pumunta na ngayon para protektahan ang inyong pamilya mula sa polusyon.
Emergency radio broadcast activated for Sitio Masag Albay: tune to 702 DZAS for 24-hour disaster updates.
Globe and Smart towers in Sitio Riverside Marikina damaged by typhoon. No signal in affected areas.
MISSING: Ang aking tatay ay nawala noong baha sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Mangyaring makipag-ugnayan sa amin.
Boil water advisory in effect for all households in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Tap water may be contaminated by flooding.
Road passability update: 6 of 9 routes to Barangay Agusan CDO now open. 3 still blocked by debris and ashfall.
Typhoon road damage report for Sitio Mabolo Albay: 5 roads closed, 8 bridges assessed for structural damage.
DPWH heavy equipment clearing lahar deposits from the access road to Brgy. Pandacan Manila. 4 hours estimated clearance time.
Philippine Coast Guard rescuing fishermen stranded at sea near Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley after typhoon signal upgrade.
Child-friendly space opened at Brgy. Carmen CDO evacuation center for minors. Activities and psychosocial support ongoing.
LGU nagbubukas ng 5 dagdag na evacuation centers sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos para sa mga lumikas mula sa bulkan.
Mga kababayan sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban, may libreng mineral water at juice sa barangay hall ngayon. Kumuha na.
EMERGENCY: Kulang ang hygiene kits sa Barangay Paco Manila evacuation distribution. Requesting immediate resupply from DSWD!
Manila air quality update: Lahat ng 4 monitoring stations ay nagpapakita ng VERY UNHEALTHY. Manatiling alerto at sundan ang susunod na update.
Staging area for relief operations set up in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Supply trucks loading for remote barangays.
Logistics team coordinating chopper delivery to cut-off communities in Brgy. Pandacan Manila after roads washed out.
Senior citizens at bata sa Maynila at karatig-siyudad: manatili sa loob ng bahay. Ang air quality ay nasa VERY UNHEALTHY level ngayon.
PHIVOLCS raises Alert Level 3 for Brgy. Fatima General Santos volcano. Residents within 6km danger zone must evacuate NOW.
Overcrowding na sa Sitio Masag Albay evacuation site. Secondary shelter sa barangay chapel ay bukas na ngayon.
WHO at DOH nagtutulungan sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos para tugunan ang heat-related illnesses. Pumunta sa pinakamalapit na klinika.
DOH issues dengue alert alongside heat advisory in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Remove stagnant water. Use mosquito repellent.
Internet access available only at evacuation center in Brgy. San Roque Marikina. Hotspot available for residents.
Ang lahar mula sa bulkan ay tumatawid sa kalsada ng Sitio Riverside Marikina. Sarado na ang daan. Gumamit ng alternative route.
DepEd Region IV-A announces no classes in public and private schools in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga tomorrow.
Ang mga pamilyang lumikas mula sa Barangay Marikina Heights ay tumatanggap ng dalawang food pack at bottled water bawat isa.
Power lines down on the main road in Barangay Balulang CDO. Do not approach downed wires. Report to Meralco.
Volunteer rescue swimmers needed at Barangay Paco Manila riverbank. Call DRRMO hotline now for coordination.
Schools in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan closed due to ashfall from volcanic eruption. DepEd to announce return schedule.
BFP responds to fire at Sitio Riverside Marikina barangay. 2 families rescued from burning structure. Fire under control.
Leptospirosis risk remains HIGH in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan post-flood areas. Still avoid wading even after waters recede.
Power restoration crew nagtatrabaho overnight sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Asahan ang pagbabalik ng kuryente bukas.
Libreng pagkain at tubig para sa mga walang trabaho dahil sa tag-init sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Pumunta sa DSWD office.
Globe signal bumalik na sa ilang parte ng Sitio Riverside Marikina. Smart at PLDT wala pa. Working on restoration.
Hikers rescued from Sitio Mabolo Albay mountain trail after being stranded by volcanic activity. All safe.
Latrines and sanitation facilities installed at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation center. One unit per 20 persons as per WASH standard.
Class suspension due to volcanic ashfall in Brgy. Tumana Marikina: schools need 3 days to clean before reopening.
NDRRMC confirms 4 fatalities due to flash flood in Sitio Mabolo Albay. Families of victims have been notified.
Remains of 2 typhoon victims recovered at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Pending identification at provincial morgue.
Walang internet ang mga evacuees sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. May libre-charging station sa evacuation center.
Missing persons report: 5 residents of Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro unaccounted for since volcanic eruption 3 days ago.
Lumikas na agad ang mga nakatira sa coastal areas ng Barangay Marikina Heights dahil sa Signal No. 4 na idineklara.
LGU nagba-bawal ng pagbabalik ng mga evacuees sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban hanggang mababa ang alert level ng bulkan.
MISSING: Tatay ko si Rolando, 67, wala pa rin simula nang erupsyon ng bulkan sa Barangay Paco Manila. Tulong!
SOS! Out of stock na ang relief goods sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. 300 families pa ang walang makain ngayong gabi!
PAGASA raises Typhoon Signal No. 3 in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. LGU orders evacuation of flood-prone barangays tonight.
Parents, please do not send children to school tomorrow in Barangay Marikina Heights. Roads are flooded and dangerous.
Lahar monitoring in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga: flow detected at 2m height in river channel. Road closures preemptive.
Calling all donors! Accepting relief goods donations for Barangay Marikina Heights flood victims. Drop off at the covered court.
Typhoon death toll in Brgy. Talisay Batangas confirmed at 500 by NDRRMC. Recovery operations continuing.
Smart at Globe nagsasagawa ng emergency network restoration sa Sitio Mabolo Albay matapos ang bagyo.
EMERGENCY: Tubig! Walang tubig dito sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina! Grabe ang init tapos wala na ring minom! Tulong po!
Walang pasok bukas! Ang lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan ay sarado. Manatili sa bahay at mag-ingat.
UV index EXTREME sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte ngayon. Magbihis ng makapal at magsuot ng sombrero kapag lumabas.
Ang kuryente sa Brgy. Daraga Albay ay naibalik na. Salamat sa Meralco at sa lahat ng nagtrabaho.
Cell on wheels temporary tower deployed in Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Limited signal now available for affected residents.
DSWD activates missing persons tracking system for Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. File reports at the welfare desk now.
Academic calendar suspended for affected schools in Sitio Masag Albay. DepEd to announce make-up class schedule.
MISSING: Lola Nena, 78, nawawala mula nang lumikas sa volcanic eruption sa Barangay Balulang CDO. Pink duster.
Provisional bridge at Brgy. Talisay Batangas constructed by Army engineers. Single lane, 3-ton weight limit.
BFP and rescue team arrived at Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Two children rescued from rising floodwater. Operations ongoing.
Natuklasan ang 2 katawan sa ilalim ng lahar ng bulkan sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Dinala na sa probinsyal na morgue.
Ang rescue team ay nakarating na sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Nagsisimula na ang pagliligtas sa mga naiipit sa lahar.
Lumikas na po ang mga pamilya sa mababang lugar ng Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Handa ang evacuation center sa covered court.
Ang paaralan sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga ay ginagamit bilang evacuation center. Suspendido ang klase hanggang maalis ang evacuees.
Camp management team deploying to Brgy. Daraga Albay evacuation site to handle 300 volcano displaced families.
Food assistance ongoing for displaced families in Brgy. Tumana Marikina following volcanic activity. Bring barangay ID.
Power demand too high sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila dahil lahat gumagamit ng aircon. Posibleng brownout ngayong hapon.
DSWD distributes relief goods to 500 families in Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Distribution at the barangay covered court. Bring valid ID.
Solar charging stations set up by DSWD in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan evacuation center for displaced residents.
Structure fire reported at Brgy. Poblacion Iligan public market. BFP units responding. 2-alarm fire declared.
Fire update: BFP contained the blaze at Barangay Anibong Tacloban warehouse after 2 hours. Investigation ongoing.
Generators distributed to Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga evacuation centers by NDRRMC. Fuel supply for 72 hours.
Evacuation ongoing: residents from ashfall-heavy areas of Brgy. Tumana Marikina being moved to secondary evacuation centers.
PAGASA issues heat index warning for Brgy. Carmen CDO and surrounding areas. Feels like 47°C. Stay indoors if possible.
Mga evacuees sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental covered court ay binibigyan ng sleeping area, kumot, at pagkain. Maayos naman.
HELP! Our neighbor is trapped on the second floor in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental! Water still rising! 911 not answering!
ALERT: Maraming bata ang may lagnat sa Sitio Masag Albay evacuation center! Kailangan ng doktor at gamot dito ngayon!
Road subsidence detected on provincial road of Brgy. Carmen CDO. Heavy vehicles must detour via bypass.
Sarado ang pangunahing daan sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City dahil sa landslide. DPWH nagtatrabaho na.
DSWD andito na sa amin sa Sitio Riverside Marikina! Nagbibigay ng hygiene kit at relief goods. Salamat po!
No electricity in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Complete blackout since typhoon hit. No signal, no internet, no power.
Walang klase sa Brgy. Daraga Albay hanggang mababa ang volcanic alert level. DepEd nagmo-monitor ng sitwasyon.
Ang mga cell tower ay nasira ng bagyo sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Kailangan ng bagong equipment para maitayo.
Bridge inspection underway at Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Currently closed pending structural assessment by DPWH engineers.
DepEd suspends classes in Barangay Anibong Tacloban due to extreme heat index reaching DANGER level. Stay home, stay safe.
Ang tubig ay nalason na ng baha sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Huwag uminom ng walang pakuluan muna ng limang minuto.
Privacy partitions installed for families at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro gymnasium. Breastfeeding area and child-friendly space also set up.
School cancellation alert: Lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. Carmen CDO ay sarado bukas dahil sa bagyo.
Philippine Air Force helicopter rescuing communities isolated by lahar flows in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte volcano slopes.
Water containers and purification tablets distributed to 500 households in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Instructions included.
Relief goods convoy arrives at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City from provincial government. 500 families to receive assistance today.
Class suspension order issued for Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental due to Typhoon Signal No. 3. All schools closed today.
MAGSUOT NG FACEMASK! Mababa ang kalidad ng hangin ngayon dahil sa usok mula sa sunog sa Navotas Landfill. Huwag lumabas nang walang proteksyon.
NDRRMC reports 3 fatalities from lahar flow in Barangay Marikina Heights. Families notified. Bodies at provincial morgue.
Typhoon casualty: body of missing resident from Sitio Kapatagan Leyte found 5km from home. Family contacted.
WASH cluster deployed to Sitio Riverside Marikina. Setting up handwashing stations, portable toilets, and clean water supply.
Ang mga may asthma at respiratory conditions ay dapat manatili sa loob ng bahay sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental dahil sa abo.
Evacuation update: All residents within permanent danger zone of Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan volcano accounted for. Operations ongoing.
DepEd distributing ashfall cleanup kits to schools in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. Brooms, masks, and disinfectant included.
Body found in lahar deposit near Brgy. Tumana Marikina river. Identity being confirmed. Family may approach MDM desk.
NFI distribution ongoing. Hygiene kits, blankets, and sleeping mats available at Brgy. Fatima General Santos barangay hall.
Parents advised not to send children to school in Brgy. Carmen CDO until air quality returns to safe levels.
Meralco please ayusin na ang power sa Barangay Agusan CDO! 72 oras na walang kuryente. Grabe na ito!
Mga buntis at matatanda sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley bibigyan ng priority sa food and water distribution ngayong mainit.
MnlCDRRMD advisory: Air quality sensors sa Maynila ay nagpapakita ng VERY UNHEALTHY. Mga may respiratory illness ay ipinagbabawal lumabas.
Debris flow from Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga volcano closes 3 major roads. Relief goods delivery using air transport.
Hindi pa passable ang kalsada sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Naghihintay pa ang mga trucks ng relief goods.
Ang mga naapektuhang pamilya sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay bibigyan ng emergency food assistance ngayong linggo.
RESCUE NEEDED: Family trapped by lahar flow in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte! Water and mud at rooftop level! SOS!
DepEd schools in Barangay Agusan CDO: 5 total — 2 being used as evacuation shelters, 3 closed for safety assessment.
USAR team deployed to collapsed building in Barangay Agusan CDO. 3 persons confirmed trapped inside structure.
Rescue operation sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila: dalawang bata ang naligtas sa baha. Nagpapatuloy pa ang paghahanap.
Relief convoy to Barangay Anibong Tacloban delayed by ashfall-covered roads. DPWH is clearing. ETA revised to 6pm.
Families from Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga danger zones transported via LGU buses to inland evacuation shelters.
PLDT announces network outage in Brgy. Talisay Batangas due to damaged cell towers. Engineers on site.
Port operations suspended in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Supply barges on standby. Coast Guard monitoring conditions.
Volunteers needed para sa repacking ng relief items sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Report sa DSWD office by 7am bukas.
Ash deposits 10cm thick on Brgy. Talisay Batangas highway. DPWH recommends complete avoidance until cleared.
Wildfire spotted near upland barangay of Barangay Anibong Tacloban. BFP dispatched. Residents placed on alert.
Academic year adjustment for Sitio Masag Albay schools disrupted by volcanic activity. DepEd extending school year.
Ashfall rendering roads in Sitio Riverside Marikina slippery and dangerous. DPWH deploying water trucks for road washing.
Ibinahagi na ang mga pagkain at gamit sa mga apektadong pamilya sa Sitio Mabolo Albay. Maraming salamat sa DSWD.
Libre ang canned goods at bigas para sa mga nasalanta sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Pumunta na sa distribution point.
Road clearing convoy proceeding to Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Backhoes and dump trucks on route now.
Relief operations underway in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. DSWD deploying non-food items including hygiene kits, sleeping mats, and tarpaulins.
Walang kuryente at walang signal sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Ganap na nahiwalay sa komunikasyon.
Mental health team available sa Brgy. Daraga Albay evacuation center. Libre ang psychosocial support para sa lahat.
Looking for our lolo. Missing since typhoon hit Barangay Agusan CDO. Name: Pedro Reyes, 70 years old, diabetic.
Respiratory health alert: Fine particulate matter levels in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley exceeding safe limits due to volcanic emissions.
Charging stations set up at Brgy. Pandacan Manila evacuation center. Bring your power bank and mobile devices.
Ang convoy ng relief goods ay hindi makarating sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley dahil sa blocked road. Nagre-reroute na.
URGENT: Puno na ang evacuation center sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental! Wala nang space para sa mga bagong dating na pamilya!
NDRRMC confirms death toll from flooding in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan: 12 fatalities, 3 missing, 45 injured.
Health advisory: Ang mga bata, matatanda, buntis, at may hika ay huwag lumabas habang mababa ang air quality sa Maynila.
HELP! Stuck sa bubong ng bahay sa Barangay Marikina Heights habang tumataas ang lahar! May kasama akong sanggol!
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Mga guro sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban naglilingkod bilang volunteers sa evacuation center habang walang klase.
Landslide at km 23 near Brgy. Tumana Marikina cleared by DPWH. One lane now passable. Flagman on duty.
Heat advisory class suspension for Brgy. Talisay Batangas: Grades 1 to 12 and college all suspended for today.
DSWD relief convoy arrived at Brgy. Tumana Marikina with 300 boxes of food packs and non-food items for flood survivors.
REMINDER: Ang paggamit ng facemask ay mandatory sa labas habang masamang kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila. N95 o surgical mask ang inirerekomenda.
Fallen tree blocking the access road to Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Clearing crew on site. Passable in 2 hours.
Rescue swimmer needed at Barangay Balulang CDO lahar crossing! Vehicle swept away! Occupants still inside!
Road advisory: thick ashfall deposit on Brgy. Daraga Albay national highway. Reduce speed. Use headlights. Wear mask.
Cell towers coated with volcanic ash in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Globe and Smart signal degraded. Engineers deploying.
Huwag kalimutang uminom ng tubig! Heat index sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga ay nakakatakot na mainit ngayon. Mag-ingat.
Rescue team ng NDRRMC nagliligtas ng mga pamilya sa Sitio Masag Albay mula sa banta ng lahar ng bulkan.
Ang lahar ay dumating na sa bayan ng Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Huwag na lumabas. Sarado lahat ng daan.
Air drops of relief goods initiated for Sitio Mabolo Albay communities inaccessible by land due to lahar flow.
TXTFIRE! May sunog sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro! Naiipit ang tatlong tao! Tumawag sa BFP ngayon! 911!
DPWH road clearing operations ongoing on national highway at Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Expect 6 to 8 hour delay.
Community feeding program active in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte for families unable to cook due to power outage from eruption.
Nag-aalaga ng lolo naming may hypertension sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Sobrang init. Saan kami makakakuha ng libre na konsultasyon?
Mountain rescue: SARDA team deployed for 8 missing hikers in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley after trail buried by landslide.
WALA PONG SIGNAL DITO SA BRGY. TALISAY BATANGAS! PLEASE PATAWID NG MENSAHE SA AMING PAMILYA!
Emergency broadcast activated at local FM station. Broadcasting disaster updates for Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan 24 hours.
Body of missing fisherman from Brgy. San Roque Marikina recovered at Zamboanga shoreline. PCG coordinating with family.
Missing person: family tracing for 3 persons from Brgy. Tumana Marikina who have not contacted family since typhoon.
Ang mga generator ng ospital sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley ay gumagana nang maayos kahit walang kuryente sa buong lungsod.
Internet access via satellite terminal available at Sitio Masag Albay municipal hall for disaster coordination.
Search and rescue operations launched in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan after flash flood. 8 rescue boats deployed.
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: NDRRMC rescue teams extract 500 families from flood-affected sitio in Barangay Paco Manila.
Mag-ingat sa leptospirosis! Huwag lumakad sa baha nang walang proteksyon sa Barangay Balulang CDO at karatig-lugar.
Wala na kaming signal dito sa evacuation center ng Brgy. Tumana Marikina! Globe at Smart patay na. Radio lang.
Evacuation center at Brgy. Tumana Marikina covered court now open. Capacity 100 families. Bring important documents.
Official MDM count: 6 confirmed dead, 11 unaccounted for in flood-affected areas of Brgy. Poblacion Iligan.
Eye wash stations set up at Brgy. Daraga Albay health center for residents affected by ashfall irritation.
Isinasagawa ang headcount ng lahat ng evacuees sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City evacuation center. Pumirma sa logbook.
College students in Barangay Anibong Tacloban advised to stay home during heat advisory. Exams moved to next week.
First aid supplies running low at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation center. Need gauze, antiseptic, and fever medicine urgently.
National highway flooded in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Passable for light vehicles only. Heavy trucks must use alternate route.
1 dead, 3 missing after landslide in Brgy. Daraga Albay. NDRRMC rescue team recovers body from debris.
Road network update for Sitio Kapatagan Leyte: 3 routes open, 2 blocked by landslide, 1 passable for light vehicles only.
Lahar rescue complete in Brgy. Daraga Albay. All 23 stranded families evacuated. No casualties reported.
Tagapamahala ng barangay sa Sitio Masag Albay nagbibigay ng emergency water supply sa bawat pamilya ngayong araw.
NDRRMC confirms 0 typhoon fatalities in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan due to preemptive evacuation. Officials commend LGU action.
Ang mga eskwelahan sa Maynila ay may special advisory: huwag ituloy ang outdoor activities ngayon dahil sa poor air quality at init ng panahon.
DSWD providing water and food to heat-affected communities in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Hydration packs included.
Hindi pa rin maibalik ang signal sa Barangay Balulang CDO. Ang komunikasyon ay sa radyo na lang.
Ang mga guro sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay nagboboluntaryo sa evacuation center habang suspendido ang klase.
Meron pang food packs sa Brgy. Daraga Albay hanggang ngayong hapon. Magdala ng ID at pumunta na agad.
Sanitation teams disinfecting evacuation centers in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley to prevent cholera and disease outbreak.
Ang mga evacuees sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental covered court ay bibigyan ng pagkain at mga gamit ngayong gabi.
Ang air quality sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina ay nasa hazardous level. Huwag lumabas nang walang mask. DOH nag-aalerto.
DOH at Manila DRRM nagbababala tungkol sa masamang kalidad ng hangin. Mga sintomas ng polusyon: ubo, pangangati ng mata, kahirapan sa paghinga.
Heat wave claims 2 lives in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Both elderly residents. DOH urges public to check on seniors.
Evacuation centers for Sitio Mabolo Albay volcano evacuees now open at Tacloban covered court and gymnasium.
Typhoon blew out main transformer serving Sitio Riverside Marikina. Replacement unit being transported from Batangas.
Sunstroke warning for outdoor workers in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Wear hat, drink water every 15 minutes. Avoid direct sunlight.
School closure in Barangay Agusan CDO: buildings covered with ashfall. Cleaning and decontamination needed before reopening.
Mag-iwas sa kalsada ng Brgy. Daraga Albay. Maraming debris at mapanganib ang daan.
Field hospital set up near Brgy. Pandacan Manila to handle surge of injured and sick patients from flood-affected areas.
Naglumikas na po kami dahil sa bulkan sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Nandito na kami sa covered court. Ligtas naman.
NDRRMC activates full response for Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City eruption. Pre-positioned relief goods and rescue teams on standby.
